headline: Helium “Tsunami” to Hit Chipmakers — The Surprising Winner to Profit From the Coming Shortage
summary: Let’s cut straight to it. A geopolitical shock just knocked roughly one-third of global helium supply offline. Iran’s strike on Qatar’s largest LNG facility damaged production lines that could take years to rebuild, stranding 200 specialized shipping containers near the Strait of Hormuz. Helium isn’t just a party-balloon gas. Chipmakers need it for semiconductor fabrication, ... Helium “Tsunami” to Hit Chipmakers — The Surprising Winner to Profit From the Coming Shortage

headline: ExxonMobil Benefits From Energy Shock As Supply Disruptions Reshape Cash Priorities
summary: ExxonMobil (NYSE:XOM) is emerging as a key beneficiary of the global energy shock linked to the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz and wider supply disruptions. Oil flows through the Strait have been disrupted during the ongoing Middle East conflict, contributing to higher crude prices and tighter supply conditions. Damage to Qatari LNG infrastructure has triggered an international helium supply shock, lifting the importance of Exxon's Shute Creek facility in Wyoming. The company is...

headline: America’s Newest Natural-Gas Export Terminal Produces Its First LNG
summary: The latest U.S. LNG export facility is ramping up in Texas and aiming to ship its first cargo of liquefied natural gas in the spring quarter.  Golden Pass LNG in Port Arthur, Texas, produced its first LNG Monday, its owners said, a big step toward selling more U.S. natural gas into the global market.  For gas consumers who are dependent on imports, the additional supply can't come soon enough.

content.title: America’s Newest Natural-Gas Export Terminal Produces Its First LNG
content.summary: The latest U.S. LNG export facility is ramping up in Texas and aiming to ship its first cargo of liquefied natural gas in the spring quarter. For gas consumers who are dependent on imports, the additional supply can't come soon enough.

headline: ExxonMobil Upgraded, Microsoft Downgraded: Updated Rankings on Top Blue-Chip Stocks
summary: During these busy times, it pays to stay on top of the latest profit opportunities. And today’s blog post should be a great place to start. After taking a close look at the latest data on institutional buying pressure and each company’s fundamental health, I decided to revise my Stock Grader recommendations for 112 big blue chips. Chances are that you have at least one of these stocks in your portfolio, so you may want to give this list a skim and act accordingly. This Week’s Ratings Changes: Up
